channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Keystone Pipeline operator to pay $26.9 million for 2022 spill
item.description: A proposed settlement with the U.S. government requires the Keystone Pipeline operator to pay $26.9 million for a 2022 oil spill in Kansas.

item.title: How Senator Lindsey Graham's seat will be filled
item.description: Longtime South Carolina Republican Senator Lindsey Graham died at 71 after a brief illness, his office announced Sunday. CBS News reports on the succession process.

item.title: Two dead, multiple injured in shooting at Toronto street festival
item.description: At least two people have died and several others were wounded in a shooting at a street festival in Toronto, according to police.

item.title: Senator Lindsey Graham dies after brief illness at age 71
item.description: U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham, a close ally of President Donald Trump, has died at 71 after a brief illness, his office confirmed.
